data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a final settlement audit trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Final settlement audit trail', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this audit trail. The linked use case describes a claim lifecycle but does not provide concrete evidence of the API endpoints or the actual implementation of the final settlement audit trail feature. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of final settlement audit trail.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the final settlement audit trail requirement.
